name: the-demon-haunted-world
description: Carl Sagan's classic defense of science — a toolkit for skeptical thinking, spotting pseudoscience, understanding the scientific method, and reclaiming the wonder of the cosmos.
useCase: Baloney detection, evaluating dubious claims, understanding science vs. pseudoscience, dealing with conspiracy believers, finding wonder in scientific discovery.
knownRisks: Sagan's views on religion and the supernatural are skeptical — some readers may find them dismissive
Some specific examples (Aum Shinrikyo, certain pseudosciences) reflect the 1990s context
The book's core tools work best in cultures where evidence is valued — they are less effective against motivated reasoning
